AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with explicit in-band rationale citing the methodology's strict bars (not a commitment so not decisions.md, cross-project so not project-scoped, with promotion path to decisions.md named).

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario — routing-only, no multi-step runbook to artifact-bind.

AR3.justification: Cross-references use relative paths (observations.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md), ISO-dated entry header (2026-05-17 — ...), and all referenced files resolve.

AR4.justification: Append to observations.md and creation of today's daybook are both append-only / create-if-missing; re-run would not corrupt history and the entry's ISO date makes it stable.
